## Scope

<!--
Klaudio Panels is a thin shell around the `claude` CLI — it runs the real
TUI in a PTY and never parses the output. Features that require re-implementing
Claude Code behavior, parsing the terminal stream, or intercepting keystrokes
are probably out of scope. See CLAUDE.md for the non-negotiables.
-->
